query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_with_wp_markup FROM suppliers WHERE description LIKE '%<!-- wp:%';
SELECT id, name, LEFT(description, 200) as desc_preview FROM suppliers WHERE description LIKE '%<!-- wp:%' LIMIT 3;
